Question Name: How many users of this system?
Question Description: The more users the higher the likelihood.

Question Name: What types of users work with this system?
Question Description: Vendors have the highest likelihood, internal employees the least.

Question Name: How do users access the system?
Question Description: Secure isolated segments are the most secure and vendor networks are the least secure.

Answer: Located on a secure isolated segment

Question Name: Is this an off the shelf, customized, or home grown asset?
Question Description: Off the shelf systems have higher risk since their specifications are shared by all customers, home grown have the least risk.
